scripts.audit: npm audit fix && npm --prefix node audit fix
scripts.build: npm run build:node && npm run build:go && npm run build:python
scripts.format:go: cd go && go fmt . && go fix ./... && cd ..
scripts.format: npm run format:node && npm run format:go && npm run format:python
scripts.install-updates: npm i --save && npm run install-updates --if-present --prefix node && cd go && go mod tidy && cd ..
scripts.lint:node: npm --prefix node run format && npm --prefix node run lint
scripts.lint:go: cd go && staticcheck ./... && golangci-lint run ./... && cd ..
scripts.lint: npm run lint:node && npm run lint:go && npm run lint:python
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:node && npm run test:unit:go && npm run test:unit:python
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:codec && npm run test:pull-callback && npm run test:rpc
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
